scripts.demo: pnpm --filter @farming-labs/orm build && pnpm --filter @farming-labs/orm-drizzle build && pnpm --filter @farming-labs/orm-prisma build && pnpm --filter @farming-labs/orm-sql build && pnpm --filter @farming-labs/orm-mongoose build && pnpm run prisma:prepare && tsx src/index.ts
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @farming-labs/orm build && pnpm --filter @farming-labs/orm-drizzle build && pnpm --filter @farming-labs/orm-prisma build && pnpm --filter @farming-labs/orm-sql build && pnpm --filter @farming-labs/orm-mongoose build && pnpm run prisma:prepare && vitest run
scripts.test:local: pnpm --filter @farming-labs/orm build && pnpm --filter @farming-labs/orm-drizzle build && pnpm --filter @farming-labs/orm-prisma build && pnpm --filter @farming-labs/orm-sql build && pnpm --filter @farming-labs/orm-mongoose build && pnpm run prisma:prepare && FARM_ORM_DEMO_INCLUDE_LOCAL=1 vitest run
